GEMS TARIFFS FOR SERVICES RENDERED BY NON-CONTRACTED EMERGENCY MEDICAL SERVICES
WITH EFFECT FROM 2026-01-01
All services for Emergency Medical Services are subject to pre-authorisation.
Please contact the GEMS Emergency Medical Evacuation Dispatch Centre at 0800 444 367.
